title: cleanthes brasiliensis
intro: Cleanthes brasiliensis, also known as "guaco" or "raiz de guaco," is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Cleanthes brasiliensis include the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Cleanthes brasiliensis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions.
